ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing size (e.g., 2XS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing product (e.g., jacket, top, pant, dress) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size is designed for (e.g., Male, Female, Unisex) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country or region the size chart is specific to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing size the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., chest, sleeves, length, shoulder, waist) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing product (e.g., jacket, top, pant, dress) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Casual, Formal, Sportswear) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing size */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the specific product size */,
  "sku" TEXT /* SKU (Stock Keeping Unit) for the specific product size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size the inventory belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Preferred size of the customer */,
  "preferred_brand" TEXT /* Preferred brand of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product in the order */,
  "price_at_order" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "refunded_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)
